description:
SkyCity Adelaide is currently looking for a Remediation Quality Analyst to join our Remediation team.

About the Opportunity

This role focuses on delivering high‑quality assurance across our remediation activities, this includes data quality, internal processes and AML/CTF processes, ensuring work meets policy, procedural, and regulatory expectations. You will analyse remediation outputs, identify errors and trends, validate data, and contribute to audit readiness while working closely with internal teams to strengthen controls and support continuous improvement.

About You

You bring experience in quality assurance or the capability to quickly develop it, supported by knowledge of financial crime compliance, AML/CTF risks, and ideally casino operations. You’re confident reviewing varied work types, preparing insights for senior stakeholders, validating data, and providing constructive feedback. Your ability to build strong relationships, support training, and contribute to process uplift positions you to enhance the organisation’s remediation quality and operational integrity.

What's in it for you?

Besides working with great people and getting firsthand experience of SkyCity's newest entertainment offerings, you will also be rewarded with a range of employee benefits including;

Free employee meals available at our employee restaurant
Subsidised car parking and public transport tickets.
Discounts available across SkyCity Adelaide venues.
Discount health insurance, free flu vaccinations, skin checks and other health checks.
Employee reward and recognition programs.
Fantastic career and professional development opportunities.
Access to Employee Assistance Program (EAP) 

No recruitment agencies please.

At SkyCity, our career opportunities are as diverse as our workforce. We don't just embrace differences; we value and support them. Our hiring is centred on capability and performance, regardless of gender, gender identity, race, origin, age, educational background, disability, or religious beliefs. We're here to empower you to shine. Our willingness to adapt ensures you can chart your path with us! Join us at SkyCity and be extraordinary by being you.
